questionHtml:
The infrared spectrum of X is shown.

[Source: SDBS, National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology.]

An unknown organic compound, X, comprising of only carbon, hydrogen and oxygen was found to contain 48.6 % of carbon and 43.2 % of oxygen.
markschemeHtml:
«n(C) =» 4.05 «mol»
AND
«n(O) =» 2.70 «mol» ✓

«% H =» 8.2 %
OR
«n(H) =» 8.12 «mol» ✓

«empirical formula =» C3H6O2 ✓

Award [2] for the simplest ratio ″1.5 C: 3 H: 1 O″.

meta.title: An unknown organic compound, X, comprising of only carbon, hydrogen and oxygen was found to contain 48.6 % of carbon and 43.2 % of oxygen. Determine the empirical formula. Identify
